1.name: Half-Kneel Hip Flexor Stretch
1.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the working hip, knee and ankle visible.

3.name: Bridging
3.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep both hips, knees and feet visible.

7.name: Side-Lying Hip Abduction
7.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep both whole legs visible from hips to ankles.

40.name: Plank
40.camera_guidance: Use a side view and keep the shoulders, elbows, hips and ankles visible.

41.name: Wall Sit
41.camera_guidance: Use a side or diagonal view and keep both knees visible.

62.name: Bicep Curl Hold
62.camera_guidance: Use a side or diagonal view and keep the active shoulder, elbow and wrist visible.

checks.label: wrist position
checks.instruction: Raise your wrist above the elbow and toward the shoulder.

69.name: Bodyweight Squat
69.camera_guidance: Use a side or diagonal view and keep both hips, knees and ankles visible.
